provenance_note: Local Crypto Lake 2026-04-01 Stage-2 integrity evidence for issue #64. Inputs are the nine Stage-1 raw units pinned (sha256/fingerprint/rows/bytes) inside the preregistration fixture and re-verified by verify_inputs.json. Run 1 = production scripts/run_binance_recon.py --engine auto (Python oracle; perp replay 84,153 s). Run 2 = stage2-native-run (production process_unit path, explicit native override, perp+spot scales 10/100; perp replay ~29 s). stage2_cross_engine_determinism pins run1==run2 on every semantic manifest field incl. published parquet sha256 (full-day cross-engine conformance, 2026-07-12 amendment). No vendor I/O of any kind was performed; no raw market rows appear in any tracked file. Regenerated 2026-07-13 after Codex P1: stage2-compare now records semantic manifest fingerprints + compared units, and the verdict binds the determinism evidence to the exact manifest content and required fixture-day unit coverage.
